=== rendered 80x50, lines=3000 ===
      29 -        // Send both \r and \n: \r is what Claude's raw-mode TUI b
         -inds to
      30 -        // "submit" (the terminal's Enter key), while \n alone is
         -Ctrl+J and
      31 -        // only inserts a literal newline into the prompt buffer —
         - which left
      32 -        // earlier nudges visibly accumulating in the input area w
         -ithout ever
      33 -        // being submitted as a turn.
      34 -        await w.write(new TextEncoder().encode(text + "\r\n"))
      35 -        await w.close()
      36 -        await proc.status
      54 +        // Step 1: write the text bytes alone. From Ink's side thi
         +s
      55 +        // looks like pasted content arriving in the prompt buffer
         +.
      56 +        await pushToDtach(dtachSocket, new TextEncoder().encode(te
         +xt))
      57 +        // Step 2: brief pause so Ink can finish its render cycle.
      58 +        await new Promise((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, SUBMIT_
         +DELAY_MS))
      59 +        // Step 3: send Enter as its own write so Ink sees it as a
      60 +        // distinct keypress event, not a paste trailer.
      61 +        await pushToDtach(dtachSocket, ENTER_KEYSTROKE)
      62 +        dbg("DTACH-OUT", `injected text+Enter to ${sessionId} (${t
         +ext.length} chars)`)
      63      } catch (e) {
      64          dbg("DTACH-OUT", `inject failed for ${sessionId}:`, e)
      65      }
